analysis: The project has a docs folder with an existing black hole themed webpage. The current theme includes dark backgrounds, cosmic visuals, and animations related to black holes. However, the theme can be enhanced with more dynamic animations, interactive elements, and a cohesive cosmic aesthetic. The improvements will focus on enhancing the visual appeal and interactivity of the black hole theme.

improvements.description: Add CSS animations for swirling black hole effects and glowing elements to enhance the cosmic theme.
Include interactive elements such as clickable black holes that reveal more information about black holes.
Implement JavaScript functions to handle interactive animations and user interactions with black hole elements.
